Internal Deal Memo  
Project Codename: Operation Emerald Acquisition

Prepared by: Mr. John Tan, Senior Analyst  
Date: 14 October 2023  

We are in advanced negotiations to acquire GreenTech Innovations Ltd, a strategic move to enhance our green energy portfolio. The proposed acquisition amount is SGD 150,000,000. The target company is identified by UEN 198765432A and its principal contact is Dr. Emily Wong, who can be reached at emily.wong@greentech.sg.

For internal compliance, the lead negotiator's NRIC is S7654321G. All communications should be directed through our legal liaison, Mr. Alex Lim, at +65 6123 4567. Further updates will be circulated as the deal progresses.

End of Memo
